text: Entering this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass partition creates a feeling of separation between realms, while the bold 'R+D' display draws my focus toward innovation and inquiry. I feel a quiet exhilaration, as if I am stepping into an arena not just of physical exhibits, but of ideas and possibilities. The laboratory of thought beckons me to reflect on how we design and inhabit our collective future.
